title: Claude 模型能力分层：一个选型心智模型
title_en: Claude Model Capability Tiers: A Selection Mental Model

body.concept: Claude 模型家族按「智能-速度」谱系排列：Opus 在智能端，Haiku 在速度端，Sonnet 居中。所有模型共享相同的基础能力（文本/图像输入、多语言、视觉理解），区别在于推理深度和响应速度。
body.analogy: 像汽车的挡位：Opus 是低挡（扭矩大、爬陡坡用），Haiku 是高挡（高速巡航、省油），Sonnet 是中间挡位，覆盖大多数路况。选错挡位不会抛锚，但会浪费动力或速度。

body_en.concept: The Claude model family is arranged on an intelligence-speed spectrum: Opus at the intelligence end, Haiku at the speed end, Sonnet in the middle. All models share the same base capabilities (text/image input, multilingual, vision) — they differ in reasoning depth and response speed.
body_en.analogy: Think of car gears: Opus is low gear (maximum torque for steep hills), Haiku is high gear (highway cruising, fuel-efficient), and Sonnet is mid gear covering most driving conditions. Using the wrong gear won't break the car, but you'll waste either power or speed.

diagram:
```
flowchart LR
    S["text+img, multilingual, vision"]
    O["Highest Intelligence · Opus"]
    B["Balanced · Sonnet"]
    H["Fastest Speed · Haiku"]

    S -.-> O & B & H
    O --> B --> H
```
